query: List the five 1 km grid cells in Lillestrøm municipality with the highest number of parcels located in quick-clay hazard areas, sorted by parcel count descending.

1.description: get parcels in quick-clay hazard areas

4.description: count parcels per 1 km grid cell

executions.sql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (statistiskrutenett1km.grid_cell_id) statistiskrutenett1km.grid_cell_id, COUNT(matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.id) AS parcel_count FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig JOIN kvikkleire ON ST_Intersects(matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.geometry, kvikkleire.geometry) JOIN statistiskrutenett1km ON ST_Intersects(matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.geometry, statistiskrutenett1km.geometry) GROUP BY statistiskrutenett1km.grid_cell_id ORDER BY statistiskrutenett1km.grid_cell_id, parcel_count DESC;

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT DISTINCT ON (statistiskrutenett1km.grid_cell_id) statistiskrutenett1km.grid_cell_id, COUNT(matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.id) AS parcel_count FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig JOIN kvikkleire ON ST_Intersects(matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.geometry, kvikkleire.geometry) JOIN statistiskrutenett1km ON ST_Intersects(matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.geometry, statistiskrutenett1km.geometry) GROUP BY statistiskrutenett1km.grid_cell_id ORDER BY statistiskrutenett1km.grid_cell_id, parcel_count DESC;
